text: Insurance brokers are responsible for placing 90% of property and casualty insurance,
but struggles through painful processes to deliver this critical service.
But why is insurance so important to the customers you serve?
When a client is not properly insured, it puts their financial stability at risk.
That's why it's so important to place coverage that is proper,
so that we can put them back into the place they were prior to the loss.
It's critical to someone's livelihood without insurance,
if there's any kind of claim scenario that comes about,
there are risks of losing everything.
In most brokerages today, operational bottlenecks don't just slow teams down,
they create risk, burnout talent and limit growth.
Falkrom is our solution to all of that.
To make this vision a reality, we've raised $25 million in funding
and are continuing to build great products that take the manual work out of brokerage operations.
Falkrom is your AI co-pilot for the entire client lifecycle,
from sales to servicing and everything in between.
Take sales.
The Falkrom platform can ingest quotes, analyze and compare coverages
and create client-ready proposals, taking what previously took hours down to just minutes.
On the servicing side, Falkrom's autonomous service tasks help account teams handle key
workflows like policy checking and certificate generation end-to-end,
allowing agencies to manage more clients without sacrificing quality of service.
When brokers can do more, it means more businesses are protected,
more people get hired, more projects get built, and the economy grows on a stronger foundation.
That's why we're building Falkrom to power the modern brokerage.
How has Falkrom changed the insurance for you?
In addition to speeding up the time to check a policy, we're getting it consistent,
but more importantly, they're able to review the results more rapidly
because it's in a consistent format each and every time.
In our new process, working with Falkrom, that policy check process is done immediately,
so the account manager can continue their flow working with that same customer,
and it doesn't sit in their inbox, it immediately gets sent off to our customer.
I'm always looking for the art of the possible, and I feel that I finally have a partner
that will help me achieve the art of the possible and the transformation that the insurance industry needs.
So with Falkrom, I can bring any problem to them, any business process that needs to be improved,
and I know that we will imagine together what we're going to do in order to change
how we do work and how we change the insurance industry.
